data.meta_description: Experience flyboard Marbella from Puerto Banús. €749/2h includes skipper, gear & drinks. Book your 2-hour session today.
data.summary: Flyboard Marbella offers a unique water sport experience from Puerto Banús. Our 2-hour charter includes all gear, a licensed skipper, and refreshments for up to 5 guests.
key_facts: Flyboard session departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
2-hour charter costs €749 (includes skipper, gear, drinks & VAT).
Suitable for up to 5 passengers (boat capacity 5 pax).
Licensed skipper provides instruction and safety briefing.
All safety equipment, life jackets, and insurance included.
Soft drinks, water, beer, white wine, and cava provided.
No prior experience needed – beginners welcome.
Book via WhatsApp for availability and instant confirmation.

faq.a: Flyboarding is a water sport where you stand on a board connected to a jet ski by a hose. The jet ski propels water through the board, lifting you into the air. You control your height and direction by shifting your weight. It’s like a real-life jetpack over the sea.

faq.q: Do I need experience to flyboard in Marbella?
faq.a: No, flyboarding is beginner-friendly. Our licensed skipper gives a full safety briefing and instruction before you start. Most first-timers are hovering within minutes. The session is guided, so you feel safe and supported throughout.

faq.q: How long is the flyboard session?
faq.a: The standard session is 2 hours. This includes briefing, gear fitting, and plenty of flyboarding time. The boat departs from Puerto Banús and stays near the coast. You can book longer sessions on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is included in the price?
faq.a: The price of €749 covers the 2-hour charter, licensed skipper, flyboard equipment, fuel, insurance, safety gear, and refreshments (soft drinks, water, beer, white wine, cava). Spanish VAT (21%) is included. No hidden extras.

faq.q: How many people can come on the boat?
faq.a: The boat carries up to 5 passengers. This includes the flyboarder and spectators. If you want more guests, we have larger boats available. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss group options.

faq.q: What should I wear for flyboarding?
faq.a: Wear a swimsuit or quick-dry clothing. Bring a towel, sunscreen, and sunglasses. We provide a life jacket and helmet. Avoid loose items like jewellery that could fall off in the water.

faq.q: Can I book a flyboard session for a private group?
faq.a: Yes, the charter is private – only your group is on board. You can celebrate a birthday, bachelor party, or team event. The skipper tailors the experience to your group. Book early to secure your preferred time.

faq.q: How do I book a flyboard session?
faq.a: Book via WhatsApp. We’ll confirm availability, answer your questions, and arrange payment. No online booking system – just a quick chat. Typical response time is under 30 minutes.

data.body_html:
Flyboard Marbella gives you the closest feeling to flying over the Mediterranean. From Puerto Banús, you strap into a flyboard powered by a jet ski and rise metres above the water. No experience needed – just a sense of adventure. Our 2-hour charter costs €749 and includes everything: skipper, gear, drinks, and VAT. Perfect for adrenaline seekers visiting Marbella.

What is flyboarding?

Flyboarding is a water sport invented in 2012. A board connects to a jet ski via a long hose. The jet ski’s thrust pushes water through nozzles under the board, lifting you into the air. You control your height and direction by leaning and shifting your weight. It’s like a real-life jetpack, but over the sea. The sensation is exhilarating – you hover, dive, and turn above the water.

Flyboard Marbella – how it works

Your session starts at Puerto Banús. You meet your licensed skipper, get fitted with a life jacket and helmet, and receive a safety briefing. Then you step onto the board. The skipper adjusts the throttle on the jet ski to control lift. Within minutes, most first-timers are hovering a metre above the surface. You can practise basic moves like hovering, turning, and even small jumps. The boat stays nearby, so you’re never far from the group.

What’s included in the flyboard charter

  • 2-hour private charter from Puerto Banús
  • Licensed skipper (English & Spanish speaking)
  • Flyboard equipment (board, hose, helmet, life jacket)
  • Fuel for the boat and jet ski
  • Soft drinks, water, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish VAT (21%)

Everything is included – no surprises. Just bring your swimwear, sunscreen, and a towel.

Boat for flyboard Marbella

We use the Dubhe – an 8-metre boat that carries up to 5 passengers. It departs from Puerto Banús and is ideal for flyboard sessions. The boat is comfortable, with shaded seating and storage for your belongings. If you have a larger group, contact us via WhatsApp for alternative boats like the Speedboat (7m, 6 pax).

Why choose Boat Rental Marbella for flyboarding?

  • Private charter – only your group on board
  • Beginner-friendly instruction from experienced skipper
  • All gear provided – no extra rental costs
  • Depart from Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella’s marina
  • Flexible booking via WhatsApp
  • Transparent pricing: €749 for 2 hours

Flyboard Marbella pricing

The 2-hour flyboard charter costs €749. This covers the boat, skipper, fuel, flyboard equipment, insurance, drinks, and VAT. There are no hidden fees. Longer sessions are available on request – just ask via WhatsApp. Payment is upfront to secure your booking.

What to bring

  • Swimsuit or quick-dry clothing
  • Towel
  • Sunscreen (SPF 50+ recommended)
  • Sunglasses with strap
  • Waterproof phone case (optional)

We provide life jackets, helmets, and the flyboard. Leave valuables at home or in the boat’s dry storage.

Flyboard Marbella – local conditions

Marbella’s Mediterranean coast offers calm, warm waters from May to October. Water temperatures range from 18°C in May to 26°C in August. The sea is typically flat in the morning, with light winds in the afternoon. Our skipper chooses the best spot near Puerto Banús based on conditions. You’ll fly over clear blue water with views of La Concha mountain and the Marbella coastline.

How to book your flyboard session

Booking is simple. Send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, time, and number of guests. We’ll confirm availability and send payment details. No online booking system – just a quick chat. Typical response time is under 30 minutes. Book at least 24 hours in advance to secure your slot.

For more information about all our charters, visit our Boat Rental Marbella homepage.

Frequently asked questions

What is flyboarding?

Flyboarding is a water sport where you stand on a board connected to a jet ski by a hose. The jet ski propels water through the board, lifting you into the air. You control your height and direction by shifting your weight. It’s like a real-life jetpack over the sea.

Do I need experience to flyboard in Marbella?

No, flyboarding is beginner-friendly. Our licensed skipper gives a full safety briefing and instruction before you start. Most first-timers are hovering within minutes. The session is guided, so you feel safe and supported throughout.

How long is the flyboard session?

The standard session is 2 hours. This includes briefing, gear fitting, and plenty of flyboarding time. The boat departs from Puerto Banús and stays near the coast. You can book longer sessions on request via WhatsApp.

What is included in the price?

The price of €749 covers the 2-hour charter, licensed skipper, flyboard equipment, fuel, insurance, safety gear, and refreshments (soft drinks, water, beer, white wine, cava). Spanish VAT (21%) is included. No hidden extras.

How many people can come on the boat?

The boat carries up to 5 passengers. This includes the flyboarder and spectators. If you want more guests, we have larger boats available. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss group options.

What should I wear for flyboarding?

Wear a swimsuit or quick-dry clothing. Bring a towel, sunscreen, and sunglasses. We provide a life jacket and helmet. Avoid loose items like jewellery that could fall off in the water.

Can I book a flyboard session for a private group?

Yes, the charter is private – only your group is on board. You can celebrate a birthday, bachelor party, or team event. The skipper tailors the experience to your group. Book early to secure your preferred time.

How do I book a flyboard session?

Book via WhatsApp. We’ll confirm availability, answer your questions, and arrange payment. No online booking system – just a quick chat. Typical response time is under 30 minutes.
